JUDGE:JOSEPH DESMOND/CLERK:ECLAVERIA/RPTR:LORETTA NAJERA C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. CASE SETTLED AND TERMS EMBODIED IN "JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION IN OPEN COURT", WHICH WAS SIGNED BY DEFT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HEMSING, MICHAEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 320 TURK STREET, #505, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL JAN-18-2000, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HEMSING, MICHAEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 320 TURK STREET, #505, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $2,782.88 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,782.88, STAYED UNTIL JAN-18-2000, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
